
### check_passphrase  {.smaller}


```
int check_passphrase(const char *versus) {
    int i = 0;
    while (passphrase[i] == versus[i] &&
           passphrase[i]) {
        i += 1;
    }
    return (passphrase[i] == versus[i]);
}

```
 

* number of iterations = number matching characters
* leaks information about passphrase, oops!


### exploiting check_passphrase (1)  {.smaller}

<table>
<tr><td>guess</td><td>measured time</td></tr>
<tr><td><!-- \hline --> aaaa</td><td>$100\pm5$</td></tr>
<tr><td>baaa</td><td>$103\pm4$</td></tr>
<tr><td>caaa</td><td>$102\pm6$</td></tr>
<tr><td><em>daaa</em></td><td><em>$111\pm5$</em></td></tr>
<tr><td>eaaa</td><td>$99 \pm6$</td></tr>
<tr><td>faaa</td><td>$101\pm7$</td></tr>
<tr><td>gaaa</td><td>$104\pm4$</td></tr>
<tr><td>…</td><td>…</td></tr>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>


### exploiting check_passphrase (2)  {.smaller}

<table>
<tr><td>guess</td><td>measured time</td></tr>
<tr><td><!-- \hline --> daaa</td><td>$102\pm5$</td></tr>
<tr><td>dbaa</td><td>$ 99\pm4$</td></tr>
<tr><td>dcaa</td><td>$104\pm4$</td></tr>
<tr><td>ddaa</td><td>$100\pm6$</td></tr>
<tr><td>deaa</td><td>$102\pm4$</td></tr>
<tr><td><em>dfaa</em></td><td><em>$109\pm7$</em></td></tr>
<tr><td>dgaa</td><td>$103\pm4$</td></tr>
<tr><td>…</td><td>…</td></tr>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>
